001~~简单朴素，均线的斜率显然比所谓“60支撑/阻碍”更有效、直观。
![[image.png]]
  
  
002~~所谓的“爆量即套现”。
![[image 1.png]]
![[image 2.png]]
  
  
  
003~~这样的一个位置远没有“很好看”，既没有很标准的破线，也没有均线的上扬，在如今我看，这样的形态具有浓浓的诱多嫌疑。
![[image 3.png]]
  
  
004~~这便是业力消耗完之后的水银泻地，美丽无需多言！
![[image 4.png]]
  
  
005~~在我看来，这2个地方挺相似的，唯一的区别就是，均线的排列。左边的均线明显的不同向（10和20均线不同向），右边的就不一样了，想来是修炼还不到家，居然错失了良机。的的确确，右边在遇到下边的60、120均线的时候遭到了抵挡，但这样的位置依然是有开仓条件的，至少比左边更“优势在我”。
![[9b54b7f8-5de1-4945-a551-14b6b97d171a.png]]
  
  
006~~这一招也是均线排列的问题。很明显地，10均线其实是在20均线之下的，这样的出招不值得接招。
![[image 5.png]]
  
  
007~~直击本质，这里还是一个空头排列的问题，空头排列并未形成。
![[image 6.png]]
  
  
008~~锤子线的教科书式教学
[![](https://onenote.officeapps.live.com/o/GetImage.ashx?&WOPIsrc=https%3A%2F%2Fmy%2Emicrosoftpersonalcontent%2Ecom%2Fpersonal%2F9dc32fea8e2d1b62%2F%5Fvti%5Fbin%2Fwopi%2Eashx%2Ffiles%2F9DC32FEA8E2D1B62%212371&access_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6IjYzMzQyRjc3ODE0MTYyRjRCQTA4Q0U1MDBCNDNCNjBENzkzQTVGNjMiLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJ4NXQiOiJZelF2ZDRGQll2UzZDTTVRQzBPMkRYazZYMk0ifQ%%2EVTT3KgZWAk4mzR45rG3voYfeMlJ4G8rqJmX6yrF9gZxYpVvmr83KFtnO18rQJs3yls3yVQ%2DWWyUbXn2bNH3%2D%5FcX1zq%2DhmAKmLGl0TRgUXdSmQezDg09lwNW0y9xgSuncdtVjKURwKv3nawmbDFyZDAutzRwigLMQ5Bah8vTRVI1DbTCaVyKOw3t6Mr5LYHph5oNtNyIUCfgjVfp%5Fm5dKEGZYz9ol1b6ozAIacchITy5Gs9sRt%5F2UcqCzCmvc7kXboifvHmgpccbsrgRcqAQQuZNPzWmRW8p6tmstH%2DY7MaAuXyAIDoRoC9DjW4gQlgGsexwx1Gon3slEweQn9C2hOw&access_token_ttl=1776212460427&ObjectDataBlobId=%7B4ca9e651-b243-481f-bff8-82d72c2a068f%7D%7B1%7D&usid=44c93638-8fe8-852d-a741-6ab312332827&build=16.0.19930.41009&waccluster=PJP1&wdwacuseragent=MSWACONSync)](https://onenote.officeapps.live.com/o/GetImage.ashx?&WOPIsrc=https%3A%2F%2Fmy%2Emicrosoftpersonalcontent%2Ecom%2Fpersonal%2F9dc32fea8e2d1b62%2F%5Fvti%5Fbin%2Fwopi%2Eashx%2Ffiles%2F9DC32FEA8E2D1B62%212371&access_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6IjYzMzQyRjc3ODE0MTYyRjRCQTA4Q0U1MDBCNDNCNjBENzkzQTVGNjMiLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJ4NXQiOiJZelF2ZDRGQll2UzZDTTVRQzBPMkRYazZYMk0ifQ%%2EVTT3KgZWAk4mzR45rG3voYfeMlJ4G8rqJmX6yrF9gZxYpVvmr83KFtnO18rQJs3yls3yVQ%2DWWyUbXn2bNH3%2D%5FcX1zq%2DhmAKmLGl0TRgUXdSmQezDg09lwNW0y9xgSuncdtVjKURwKv3nawmbDFyZDAutzRwigLMQ5Bah8vTRVI1DbTCaVyKOw3t6Mr5LYHph5oNtNyIUCfgjVfp%5Fm5dKEGZYz9ol1b6ozAIacchITy5Gs9sRt%5F2UcqCzCmvc7kXboifvHmgpccbsrgRcqAQQuZNPzWmRW8p6tmstH%2DY7MaAuXyAIDoRoC9DjW4gQlgGsexwx1Gon3slEweQn9C2hOw&access_token_ttl=1776212460427&ObjectDataBlobId=%7B4ca9e651-b243-481f-bff8-82d72c2a068f%7D%7B1%7D&usid=44c93638-8fe8-852d-a741-6ab312332827&build=16.0.19930.41009&waccluster=PJP1&wdwacuseragent=MSWACONSync)
  
  
009~~
蓝线是一个阻挡位，要突破就得爆量
但，突破之后并没有接着上涨，而是进入盘整期
接下来，一旦突破了5日线、10日线（主要是10日线，5日线波动太大），并且站稳了10日线
这个突破还得有一个伴生的看涨技术形态
有目共睹，下面便是上升期
[![](https://onenote.officeapps.live.com/o/GetImage.ashx?&WOPIsrc=https%3A%2F%2Fmy%2Emicrosoftpersonalcontent%2Ecom%2Fpersonal%2F9dc32fea8e2d1b62%2F%5Fvti%5Fbin%2Fwopi%2Eashx%2Ffiles%2F9DC32FEA8E2D1B62%212371&access_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6IjYzMzQyRjc3ODE0MTYyRjRCQTA4Q0U1MDBCNDNCNjBENzkzQTVGNjMiLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJ4NXQiOiJZelF2ZDRGQll2UzZDTTVRQzBPMkRYazZYMk0ifQ%%2EVTT3KgZWAk4mzR45rG3voYfeMlJ4G8rqJmX6yrF9gZxYpVvmr83KFtnO18rQJs3yls3yVQ%2DWWyUbXn2bNH3%2D%5FcX1zq%2DhmAKmLGl0TRgUXdSmQezDg09lwNW0y9xgSuncdtVjKURwKv3nawmbDFyZDAutzRwigLMQ5Bah8vTRVI1DbTCaVyKOw3t6Mr5LYHph5oNtNyIUCfgjVfp%5Fm5dKEGZYz9ol1b6ozAIacchITy5Gs9sRt%5F2UcqCzCmvc7kXboifvHmgpccbsrgRcqAQQuZNPzWmRW8p6tmstH%2DY7MaAuXyAIDoRoC9DjW4gQlgGsexwx1Gon3slEweQn9C2hOw&access_token_ttl=1776212460427&ObjectDataBlobId=%7B5d509968-d655-4334-b49a-af9b4f188703%7D%7B1%7D&usid=44c93638-8fe8-852d-a741-6ab312332827&build=16.0.19930.41009&waccluster=PJP1&wdwacuseragent=MSWACONSync)](https://onenote.officeapps.live.com/o/GetImage.ashx?&WOPIsrc=https%3A%2F%2Fmy%2Emicrosoftpersonalcontent%2Ecom%2Fpersonal%2F9dc32fea8e2d1b62%2F%5Fvti%5Fbin%2Fwopi%2Eashx%2Ffiles%2F9DC32FEA8E2D1B62%212371&access_token=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsImtpZCI6IjYzMzQyRjc3ODE0MTYyRjRCQTA4Q0U1MDBCNDNCNjBENzkzQTVGNjMiLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJ4NXQiOiJZelF2ZDRGQll2UzZDTTVRQzBPMkRYazZYMk0ifQ%%2EVTT3KgZWAk4mzR45rG3voYfeMlJ4G8rqJmX6yrF9gZxYpVvmr83KFtnO18rQJs3yls3yVQ%2DWWyUbXn2bNH3%2D%5FcX1zq%2DhmAKmLGl0TRgUXdSmQezDg09lwNW0y9xgSuncdtVjKURwKv3nawmbDFyZDAutzRwigLMQ5Bah8vTRVI1DbTCaVyKOw3t6Mr5LYHph5oNtNyIUCfgjVfp%5Fm5dKEGZYz9ol1b6ozAIacchITy5Gs9sRt%5F2UcqCzCmvc7kXboifvHmgpccbsrgRcqAQQuZNPzWmRW8p6tmstH%2DY7MaAuXyAIDoRoC9DjW4gQlgGsexwx1Gon3slEweQn9C2hOw&access_token_ttl=1776212460427&ObjectDataBlobId=%7B5d509968-d655-4334-b49a-af9b4f188703%7D%7B1%7D&usid=44c93638-8fe8-852d-a741-6ab312332827&build=16.0.19930.41009&waccluster=PJP1&wdwacuseragent=MSWACONSync)

010~~简约朴素
![[image 7.png]]
  
  
011~~并没能形成空头排列，或者说这样的形态还不够完美。
![[image 8.png]]
  
  
012~~
